content.en:
"Yes, the Lord of Ice Glass has broken through, and his strength has surpassed any of us, even if we join forces to arrange the formation, we can deal with the Lord of Ice Glass, but the Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor of the Ice Beast Palace is no less than us!"

The Lord of Gu Heng said helplessly.

"Can I ask for help from other forces?"

The Lord of Eternal Zero proposed.

"No!" the Lord of Gu Heng shook his head, "I contacted several forces, even the Ancient Demon Sea and the Taidu Realm, but they learned that the Lord of Ice Glass had broken through, and they didn't want to offend the Ice Beast Palace. "

"The Ancient Demon Sea and the Taidu Realm belong to the same area as us, and they don't even help!" said a deputy mountain lord angrily.

"For them, changing forces has no effect!" the Lord of Eternal Zero also understood this truth, and sighed deeply helplessly.

......

Ice Beast Palace.

The Lord of Ice Glass was also discussing with the other Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors.

"Ice Glass Palace Master, are we really going to deal with Gu Heng Mountain this time?" a deputy palace master asked.

"Naturally, we have to deal with Gu Heng Mountain!" "The Lord of Ice Glass said resolutely: "The contradictions between us and Gu Heng Mountain have accumulated for countless years, this time I broke through, and my strength crushed Gu Heng Mountain, so I naturally have to deal with them." Is it possible, when their strength improves, they can't deal with us again?"

At this time, the Origin Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor mentioned Ye Tian.

"Ice Glass Palace Master, there is a genius from the other side of Gu Heng Mountain who has joined Fengya Island!"

The Lord of Ice Glass frowned slightly when he heard about Wind Tooth Island, but he said, "Joining Wind Tooth Island does not mean that you will definitely be able to become the Heavenly Ancestor of the Origin Realm, maybe you will fall one day." Besides, the Endless Lord has not been joining Gu Heng Mountain for a long time, even if we destroy Gu Heng Mountain, he will not necessarily mention Gu Heng Mountain for revenge. Besides, if that Endless Lord wants to catch up with my strength, I don't know how many long years it will take!By the time he breaks through to the Origin Realm, maybe I'll have already broken through to the peak of the Origin Lower Realm. When he grows up to my point, I may already be in the Origin Middle Realm, and I don't need to be afraid of him. "

"That's what the Ice Glass Palace Master said!"

The other deputy palace masters responded one after another.

"The next step is to encroach on the treasure land of Guheng Mountain. The Lord of Ice Glass planned: "There are still a lot of magic circles in Gu Heng Mountain, if you directly attack Gu Heng Mountain, you may have a lot of losses." If you force the origin realm of Gu Heng Mountain out, you can easily kill it. If they don't come out, then we will occupy all the treasures of Guheng Mountain, and make Guheng Mountain a lonely mountain. "

"Yes!"

Many deputy palace masters responded.

......

In the following days, the Ice Beast Palace continued to invade the treasures of Guheng Mountain, and many patrol envoys, envoys, and a few lords were killed by the Ice Beast Palace before they could escape.

If it was before, the deputy mountain master of the Origin Realm of Gu Heng Mountain would definitely come as soon as possible.

But now, they naturally don't dare to come forward.

Gradually, the treasures of Guheng Mountain were occupied, which caused heavy losses to Guheng Mountain, and many members fled.

Seeing this situation, Gu Hengshan was afraid that it was about to fall apart.

Thereupon.

The deputy mountain lords of Guheng Mountain and the mountain owners met again.

"Can we contact the Endless Lord? He joined Wind Tooth Island, even if his strength is not good now, he may know the powerful Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor, if there is a powerful Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor interfering from it, maybe he can keep Gu Heng Mountain. "

The Lord of Eternal Zero proposed.

"Endless Lord, he hasn't joined Wind Tooth Island for too long, and he can invite the powerful Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor of Wind Tooth Island?"

The Lord of Gu Heng was skeptical.

"Gotta give it a try!"

The Lord of Eternal Zero.

"Then I'll have to give it a try!"

The Lord of Gu Heng nodded.

Subsequently.

They contacted the Lord of Infinity.

......

"Gu Hengshan has finally contacted me!"

Ye Tian had long known about the war between the Ice Beast Palace and Gu Heng Mountain, and he also knew that Gu Heng Mountain was in a dangerous situation.

But.

His replica body was hidden in the boundary of territorial waters and was not exposed.

So, it's inconvenient for him to appear now.

In addition, the Lord of Gu Heng did not approve of him leaving Gu Heng Mountain to join Fengya Island, and in the entire Gu Heng Mountain, he also had a good relationship with the Lord of Eternal Zero.

There was no need for him to rush to help.

But if Gu Hengshan came to ask him for help, he would naturally still have to help.

"Then destroy the Ice Beast Palace!"

Ye Tian's copy body rushed to Gu Heng Mountain.

Guheng Mountain.

When the Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors were worried, Ye Tian came.

"The Infinity Lord is back!"

The Lord of Eternal Zero was surprised.

He originally thought that the Endless Lord was asking a powerful Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor to help, but he didn't expect that it would be the Endless Lord who came back alone.

Wow!

The Lord of Endless entered the Ancient Heng Mountain.

At this moment, those Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors of Gu Heng Mountain naturally noticed that Ye Tian Xiu had broken through to the Origin Realm, but they didn't really think that Ye Tian had the strength to defeat the Lord of Ice Glass.

The Lord of Ice Glass is also a genius at the other side of the Origin Realm, and his cultivation has also reached the late stage of the Origin Lower Realm, while Ye Tian definitely still belongs to the early stage of the Origin Lower Realm.

So, the Endless Lord came back alone, and they weren't so excited.

"Lord of Infinity, did you come back on your own?"

The Lord of Eternal Zero asked.

"Yes!" Ye Tian said lightly.

"This ......" the Lord of Eternal Zero said helplessly: "Lord of Endless, the Lord of Ice Glass of the Ice Beast Palace is a genius of the other side in the late stage of the Origin Lower Realm, and his strength is very strong, you are probably not an opponent!"

He was a euphemism.

He was tempted to say, you are certainly not an opponent!

However, Ye Tian smiled and said, "You can't help but think too highly of that Lord of Ice Glass, it's just a Origin Realm, if he is in the middle of the Origin, I may still be afraid of it." "

"It's just a matter of returning to the beginning???

The Lord of Gu Heng was speechless by Ye Tian's arrogant tone.

He has seen madness, but he has never seen Ye Tian so crazy!

Everyone is a genius on the other side, why is Ye Tian so confident?

"Endless Lord, this is no joke!" "If you don't do it well, not only will you fall, but the entire Gu Heng Mountain will fall with you!"

"Why, the Lord of Gu Heng doesn't believe in my strength?"

Ye Tiandao.

"Yes, I don't believe in your strength. "

The Lord of the Ancient Heng admitted.

"That's it, you and I will fight each other, although you are not a genius at the other side, but you are also a cultivator with the peak of the Origin and Lower Realm, and your combat effectiveness should also be okay. Ye Tian suggested.

"Good!"

The Lord of Gu Heng agreed.

The Lord of Eternal Zero didn't stop it, he also wanted to see how strong Ye Tian was. ~
